physical.description: InBody composition and ECG normality indicate a healthy physical state. Bioresonance physical findings support this assessment.

emotional.description: Bio-Well stress index indicates low/moderate stress levels. Nadi vikruti/pulse quality suggests a balanced emotional state.

psychological.description: Bio-Well psychology indicators suggest a normal psychological state. Nadi stress/overthinking parameters indicate no significant concerns.

spiritual.description: Bio-Well chakra alignment % and energy reserve % indicate good spiritual health.

wellness.diet: Eat a balanced diet that includes plenty of fruits and vegetables. Avoid spicy and heavy foods.
wellness.yoga: Practice gentle yoga poses to improve flexibility and balance. Focus on deep breathing exercises.
wellness.physicalActivity: Engage in regular physical activity, such as walking or jogging, for at least 30 minutes a day.
wellness.sleep: Get 7-8 hours of sleep each night to help your body recover from the day's activities.
wellness.stress: Practice stress-reducing techniques, such as meditation or deep breathing exercises, to manage stress levels.
wellness.supplements: Consider taking supplements that support digestive health, such as probiotics or digestive enzymes.
wellness.medicine: Consult with an Ayurvedic practitioner about potential medicines and herbs to support your overall health.
